metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.title: Template GUID
text.description: The GUID of the created Template

text_1.title: Processing Log GUID
text_1.description: The GUID of the Processing Log

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch aggregate="true">
  <entity name="hso_projectproduct">
    <attribute name="hso_projectproductid" alias="projecttype_count" aggregate="count" />
    <attribute name="hso_projecttype" alias="projecttype" groupby="true" />
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_isbillofmaterials" operator="eq" value="1" />
      <condition attribute="hso_templateid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text']}" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{variables('varItemCount')} Template Positions to update for Project Type '@{item()['projecttype@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}'. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch version="1.0" count="1000" page="@{variables('varPageNumber')}" @{variables('varPagingCookie')} output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" returntotalrecordcount="true">
  <entity name="hso_templatedetail">
    <attribute name="hso_templatedetailid"/>
    <attribute name="hso_projecttype"/>
    <attribute name="hso_sortinglinenumber"/>
    <attribute name="hso_level"/>
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_isbillofmaterial" operator="eq" value="1" />
      <condition attribute="hso_templateid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text']}" />
      <condition attribute="hso_projecttype" operator="eq" value="@{item()['projecttype']}" />
    </filter>
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" descending="false"/>
  </entity>
</fetch>

<fetch>
  <entity name="hso_projectproduct">
    <attribute name="hso_projectproductid" />
    <attribute name="hso_projecttype" />
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_isbillofmaterials" operator="eq" value="1" />
      <condition attribute="hso_templateid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()?['text']}" />
      <condition attribute="hso_projecttype" operator="eq" value="@{item()['projecttype']}" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - New Bill of Material for Project Type '@{item()['projecttype@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']}' was created. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when processing Template Positions! @{variables('varNumberOfTemplatePositions_Processed')} of @{variables('varNumberOfTemplatePositions_ToProcess')} Positions were processed. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - There are no Bill of Materials with the same Project Type. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required Template Positions have been processed.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Template Positions may have been partially processed. Check Log for further details.

parameters.item/hso_name: Stücklisten in Vorlage je Projekttyp zusammenfassen - @{body('Convert_time_zone')}
